description_long: This is a modern residential bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring numerous mature trees and a paved driveway. The main structure is single-storied with a flat roof and large, rectangular windows, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The property includes a detached garage with a dark roof, positioned near the entrance of the lot, and a secondary building or annex towards the rear. The grounds are well-maintained, with a mix of open lawn, dense tree clusters, and a privacy hedge along one boundary. The bungalow's facade is characterized by clean lines, light-colored walls, and expansive glazing, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor connectivity. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear pathways and driveways leading to the main entrance and garage.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a detached garage, set in a landscaped lot with trees and open lawns.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an elevated angle, highlighting the main building, detached garage, and the extensive tree coverage on the lot.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the property from the rear, emphasizing the driveway, garage, and the dense tree line along the back and side.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side perspective, showcasing the length of the lot, the privacy hedge, and the arrangement of buildings and trees.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the front approach, focusing on the main entrance, driveway, and the open space leading up to the bungalow.
